plugins.name: flutter-skill
plugins.description: Opinionated Flutter mobile development skill. Feature-first architecture, Riverpod+Hooks, GoRouter, Retrofit+Dio, Freezed, ScreenUtil, testing, error handling, caching, WebSocket. 60 rules, 41 anti-patterns, 25 ready-made patterns, 29-point pre-delivery checklist. Separate integrations skill (Sentry, Firebase, Supabase, Amplitude) — loaded on demand.
